description:
Court notebook with four distinct records.

(I) Set of quittances each beginning "ubriʾa min X," all relating to to a quantity of coral which the late Nissim had deposited with the late ʿAllān via a power of attorney registered with the court. The first is between Ḥananʾel b. Yaʿaqov known as Khiyār and Netanʾel b. Ṣadaqa; the second is for Abū l-Riḍā Shelomo b. Mevorakh; and the third is for Benaya b. [Mūsā?]. There is also mention of "that which was deposited with Avraham b. Yosef ha-Mumḥe and Shelomo b. Saʿadya al-Ṣurī." See also T-S 10J28.12 (PGPID 2987).

(II) See PGPID 40207

(III) See PGPID 40208

(IV) See PGPID 8408

(Information in part from Goitein's index card with additions by MY/AA/ASE). Join: Alan Elbaum.
description_he: פנקס בית דין עם ארבעה רישומים; כולל ויתורים על כמות אלמוגים שהפקיד המנוח נסים אצל המנוח עלאן, בין חנאנאל בן יעקב ידוע כחיאר, נתנאל בן צדקה, ואחרים
